## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Shaped and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, CMS usage, and blog post publishing process.](https://fathom.video/share/_9UBjUEED7yS6MsPZ1vS9rXBZuFLcJnc?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [CMS walkthrough provided; blog post structure and image requirements clarified](https://fathom.video/share/_9UBjUEED7yS6MsPZ1vS9rXBZuFLcJnc?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)
  - [Agreement to use AI-generated images with brand colors for blog post headers](https://fathom.video/share/_9UBjUEED7yS6MsPZ1vS9rXBZuFLcJnc?tab=summary&timestamp=127.0)
  - [Content publishing process streamlined; focus on getting signal and iterating](https://fathom.video/share/_9UBjUEED7yS6MsPZ1vS9rXBZuFLcJnc?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
  - [Deeper editorial oversight needed for mid-funnel content and case studies](https://fathom.video/share/_9UBjUEED7yS6MsPZ1vS9rXBZuFLcJnc?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)

## Topics

### Team Updates and Introductions

  - [Tiandra Burns introduced as new content manager in week 4 at GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/_9UBjUEED7yS6MsPZ1vS9rXBZuFLcJnc?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)
  - [Nico leaving GrowthX at end of week; Tiandra taking over content responsibilities](https://fathom.video/share/_9UBjUEED7yS6MsPZ1vS9rXBZuFLcJnc?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)

### CMS Walkthrough and Blog Post Structure

  - [Blog posts located under "blog posts" section in Webflow CMS](https://fathom.video/share/_9UBjUEED7yS6MsPZ1vS9rXBZuFLcJnc?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
  - [Post summary powers opening statement before headline image](https://fathom.video/share/_9UBjUEED7yS6MsPZ1vS9rXBZuFLcJnc?tab=summary&timestamp=481.0)
  - [Main image required for each post; considering AI-generated options with brand colors](https://fathom.video/share/_9UBjUEED7yS6MsPZ1vS9rXBZuFLcJnc?tab=summary&timestamp=534.0)
  - [Author attribution to be determined (possibly using Tully for all posts)](https://fathom.video/share/_9UBjUEED7yS6MsPZ1vS9rXBZuFLcJnc?tab=summary&timestamp=544.0)
  - [Blog roles and categories present but currently non-functional](https://fathom.video/share/_9UBjUEED7yS6MsPZ1vS9rXBZuFLcJnc?tab=summary&timestamp=561.0)

### Image Strategy for Blog Posts

  - [Challenge: Creating unique images for each post is time-consuming](https://fathom.video/share/_9UBjUEED7yS6MsPZ1vS9rXBZuFLcJnc?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)
  - [Solutions discussed:](https://fathom.video/share/_9UBjUEED7yS6MsPZ1vS9rXBZuFLcJnc?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)
    1.  AI-generated images using brand colors and guidelines
    2.  Figma templates with interchangeable colors and titles (less preferred due to repetition)
  - [Agreement to test AI-generated images as V1, with option to pivot if needed](https://fathom.video/share/_9UBjUEED7yS6MsPZ1vS9rXBZuFLcJnc?tab=summary&timestamp=774.0)

### Content Publishing Process

  - [Initial posts to be drafted and approved before publishing](https://fathom.video/share/_9UBjUEED7yS6MsPZ1vS9rXBZuFLcJnc?tab=summary&timestamp=633.0)
  - [Focus on getting content live to gather data and iterate](https://fathom.video/share/_9UBjUEED7yS6MsPZ1vS9rXBZuFLcJnc?tab=summary&timestamp=1139.0)
  - [Balance between maintaining quality and increasing publishing pace](https://fathom.video/share/_9UBjUEED7yS6MsPZ1vS9rXBZuFLcJnc?tab=summary&timestamp=1065.0)
  - [Glossary/top-of-funnel pieces to have lighter touch in editing](https://fathom.video/share/_9UBjUEED7yS6MsPZ1vS9rXBZuFLcJnc?tab=summary&timestamp=1154.0)
  - [Case studies and mid-funnel content to receive deeper editorial oversight](https://fathom.video/share/_9UBjUEED7yS6MsPZ1vS9rXBZuFLcJnc?tab=summary&timestamp=1164.0)

### Upcoming Content and Feedback

  - [Nick has reviewed proposed articles, approving with minor changes](https://fathom.video/share/_9UBjUEED7yS6MsPZ1vS9rXBZuFLcJnc?tab=summary&timestamp=1314.0)
  - [David to implement Nick's comments and prepare drafts for final check](https://fathom.video/share/_9UBjUEED7yS6MsPZ1vS9rXBZuFLcJnc?tab=summary&timestamp=982.0)
  - [Agreement to prioritize getting approved articles into Webflow for publishing](https://fathom.video/share/_9UBjUEED7yS6MsPZ1vS9rXBZuFLcJnc?tab=summary&timestamp=1331.0)

## Next Steps

  - [David to implement Nick's comments on existing drafts and prepare for publishing](https://fathom.video/share/_9UBjUEED7yS6MsPZ1vS9rXBZuFLcJnc?tab=summary&timestamp=982.0)
  - [Jakub to send Shaped's color palette for AI-generated image creation](https://fathom.video/share/_9UBjUEED7yS6MsPZ1vS9rXBZuFLcJnc?tab=summary&timestamp=1352.0)
  - [Team to test AI-generated images for blog post headers](https://fathom.video/share/_9UBjUEED7yS6MsPZ1vS9rXBZuFLcJnc?tab=summary&timestamp=1352.0)
  - [Begin publishing approved content to gather data and iterate](https://fathom.video/share/_9UBjUEED7yS6MsPZ1vS9rXBZuFLcJnc?tab=summary&timestamp=1336.0)
  - [Implement deeper editorial process for case studies and mid-funnel content](https://fathom.video/share/_9UBjUEED7yS6MsPZ1vS9rXBZuFLcJnc?tab=summary&timestamp=1164.0)
